sections.paragraph:
ὠνέομαι mid. dep. (Hes., Hdt.+; ins, pap, Test12Patr, Philo, Joseph.; Tat. 23, 1f) 1 aor. ὠνησάμην (Eupolis [V b.c.. But s. Kühner-Bl. II 577]; Plut., Nic. 529 [10, 2]; Paus. 3, 4, 4; Lucian, Herm. 81; ins [Schweizer 177; OGI 669, 31]; pap [UPZ 12, 16, 158 b.c.; POxy 1188, 19]; Jos., Ant. 2, 39. Beside it ἐωνησάμην and the Att. ἐπριάμην.—Crönert 283) buy τὶ παρά τινος someth. from someone w. gen. of price (Aristoxenus [IV b.c.], Fgm. 43 Wehrli ἑκατὸν μνῶν; Jos., Ant. 7, 332) Ac 7:16 (cp. Jos., Ant. 1, 237).—B. 817. DELG. M-M.

dep. dep. = deponent

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

aor. aor. = aorist

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Paus Paus , perieg., II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Schweizer Schweizer = ES., Grammatik der pergamenischen Inschriften—Lists 3, 6

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

UPZ UPZ = Urkunden der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Att. Att. = Attic, esp. in ref. to dialect

someth. someth. = something

gen. gen. = genitive

Aristoxenus Aristoxenus , mus., IV b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts
  2. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1102
